since_last: 46% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.44%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.40% · Gold +0.22% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 46% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.44%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.44%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +21.33%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.33%, WDAY +2.47%, AMAT +2.36%, LRCX +2.14%, D +2.05%. Laggards: DLR -5.38%, TTD -3.16%, HON -1.90%, SAP -1.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.19% at $162.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
